title: alectorolophus rusticulus
side_effects: Alectorolophus rusticulus can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant may lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while others may experience skin irritation, hives, or anaphylaxis. Additionally, improper use of Alectorolophus rusticulus can also cause dizziness, headaches, and in severe cases, seizures or even organ damage. It is essential to consult with a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using Alectorolophus rusticulus to minimize the risk of adverse side effects.
